title: Scenography III

prerequisites.text: Completion of T&P Studiowork 2 and placement in the Scenography concentration. THEATRE, DANCE AND PERFORMANCE STUDIES 428

outline: In this project based course, students develop their understanding of scenographic practice, research and visual communicative skills, as well as the manipulation of material, visual metaphor and body as a live performance catalyst. A fieldwork component may be included as part of this course.
lecture_times: Seminars will be timetabled departmentally each year. All meetings will be on the Hiddingh Campus
dp_requirements: Attendance at all classes, performances and rehearsals. Completion of all projects.
assessment: Coursework, classwork, in house performances count 50% of final mark; final practical examination counts 50% of final mark. In order to pass, students must obtain at least 50% in both of the above.
